description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a prominent T-shaped visor area on the front, reminiscent of Mandalorian-style headgear. The exterior is primarily a deep red with black and metallic gray accents, giving it a striking, armored appearance. A distinctive antenna or rangefinder is mounted on the left side, adding a functional and tactical element. The helmet sits on a wooden display base, suggesting it is a collectible or display piece. The surface finish is mostly matte with some subtle gloss on the metallic sections, and the construction appears to be a combination of metal and high-impact plastic. There are no visible ventilation openings or graphic designs beyond the color blocking.
description: A red and black armored helmet with a T-shaped visor, metallic accents, and a side-mounted antenna, displayed on a wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped visor and the symmetrical red and black color scheme.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding antenna and layered metallic detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the segmented back panel and the absence of a visor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible antenna and layered construction.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid color blocking with red, black, and gray; no additional graphics or motifs.
